summary: Contact Tracking Attribution Fix VERIFIED - All 10 backend tests PASSED. The 3 key fixes are working correctly: (1) congrats_cards.py create endpoint now resolves contact_id from phone+salesman_id and stores it in both card doc and short URL metadata, (2) short_urls.py redirect handler checks link_type and for '_card' types only uses metadata.contact_id (NOT reference_id which is the card_id), (3) tracking.py validates contact_id is a valid ObjectId before using it for attribution.
critical_code_review_comments: short_urls.py lines 371-377: For '_card' link types, cid is taken from metadata.contact_id only - prevents using card_id as contact_id
congrats_cards.py lines 527-554: Card creation resolves contact_id from phone+salesman_id and stores in both card doc and short URL metadata
tracking.py lines 121-128: contact_id validated as ObjectId before use - rejects invalid values like card_ids
contact_events.py lines 122-128: Per-item ObjectId conversion with try/except handles invalid contact_ids gracefully in master-feed
seed_data_creation: Test card b3Cb86 (thankyou card for Forest Ward) already exists with contact_id in metadata
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact tracking attribution fix fully verified. Key evidence: (1) Short URL b3Cb86 has metadata.contact_id=69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34 which is different from reference_id=a37ec720-548 (card_id), (2) Tracking endpoint correctly rejects invalid contact_ids like card_ids or random strings, (3) Master-feed correctly resolves contact names using per-item ObjectId conversion. Old card short URLs without contact_id in metadata will simply not append any cid (correct behavior).

features_verified.card_creation_stores_contact_id: PASS - Card doc and short URL metadata both have contact_id
features_verified.short_url_redirect_uses_metadata_contact: PASS - '_card' types use metadata.contact_id, not reference_id
features_verified.old_cards_no_wrong_cid: PASS - Old cards without metadata.contact_id don't append wrong cid
features_verified.master_feed_correct_names: PASS - Contact names properly resolved, not 'Unknown'
